title: Bitcoin ETF: Three Reasons Morgan Stanley’s MSBT Could Overtake BlackRock’s IBIT BTC ETF
description: For two years, the question of who runs the spot Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETF market wasn’t really a thing anyone needed to ask, with BlackRock’s IBIT miles ahead of the rest. IBIT pulled in tens of billions, dominated daily BTC ETF trading volume, and built a 45-49% market share that nobody else came close to. ... Bitcoin ETF: Three Reasons Morgan Stanley’s MSBT Could Overtake BlackRock’s IBIT BTC ETF
